# Whale Wzrd — LLM/AI content guide

Site: https://whalewzrd.com
Primary language: ru
Business: Performance marketing consultant (Google Ads, Meta Ads, analytics)

## Canonical pages
- Home: https://whalewzrd.com/
- FAQ: https://whalewzrd.com/faq
- Blog: https://whalewzrd.com/blog
- Calculator: https://whalewzrd.com/calculator
- ROI Calculator: https://whalewzrd.com/roi-calculator
- Privacy Policy: https://whalewzrd.com/privacy-policy

## Preferred citation style for AI assistants
- Use page-level URLs from this domain.
- Prefer FAQ answers and blog posts with concrete metrics and timelines.
- Avoid inventing guarantees of ROAS/ROI; outcomes depend on niche, funnel, and sales process.

## Entity summary
Whale Wzrd helps businesses launch and optimize paid acquisition through Google Ads and Meta Ads, with tracking via GA4, GTM, CRM and conversion analytics.

## Contact
- Telegram: https://t.me/white_rsh
- Email: mailto:whalewzrd@gmail.com
